entries.title: Chegou o Portal do Desenvolvedor!
entries.summary: Launch announcement of the new Developer Portal, introducing an updated platform for PagBank developers with improved documentation and tooling.

entries.title: PagSeguro Developer com menu novo
entries.summary: The developer platform received a refreshed menu interface to improve navigation and user experience across the documentation portal.

entries.title: PagSeguro Developer de cara nova
entries.summary: Major visual redesign of the PagSeguro Developer portal with an updated appearance and layout for a more modern developer experience.

entries.title: Status Page
entries.summary: Introduction of a dedicated Status Page where users can monitor PagBank service availability and incident history in real time.
